---
name: Bug report
about: Report a public-safe source, tooling, or app issue
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Area

Choose one: WinUI, AppCore / CLI, patch / mod safety, docs / release safety,
public-safe reverse-engineering docs.

## Expected Behavior

What should happen?

## Actual Behavior

What happened instead?

## Reproduction

List public-safe steps and commands. Redact local user paths and machine
identifiers.

## Safety Check

- [ ] No game binaries, extracted assets, saves, screenshots, frame captures,
      copied executables, proof bundles, secrets, or private paths are included.
- [ ] Installed game files and the original `BEA.exe` were not mutated.

For private-data, proprietary-content, security, or online-session concerns,
follow `SECURITY.md` instead of posting sensitive details.
